creator: takachan@running-dog.net
text:
japanese/mozc-el becomes the most recent version, but, in japanese/mozc-server, japanese/mozc-tool and  japanese/ibus-mozc a version remains old.

Fix: 

Because I updated three ports, I attach it.

./ports-mozcs
./ports-mozcs/ports-mozc-server-20110816.tgz
./ports-mozcs/ports-mozc-tool-20110816.tgz
./ports-mozcs/ports-ibus-mozc-20110816.tgz


http://icmpv6.org/Prog/FreeBSD_ports/ports-mozcs-20110816.tgz
How-To-Repeat: Because japanese/mozc-server is an old version, japanese/mozc-el does not work.
